ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.note: Still one of the clearest entry points for local model workflows, especially as agent and coding use cases expand.

langchain.name: LangChain
langchain.note: Its recent work around agent harnesses, memory, and tooling makes it a useful barometer for how agent engineering is maturing.

promptfoo.name: Promptfoo
promptfoo.note: Still one of the most practical tools for prompt-injection testing, guardrail checks, and evaluation before deployment.

huggingface.name: Hugging Face Hub
huggingface.note: Storage Buckets is a reminder that the Hub is becoming project infrastructure, not just a model showcase.
